model.label: MiMo-V2-Pro
model.description: MiMo • The flagship foundation for the agentic era, built for complex, long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks.

pick.rationale: Vanderbilt holds a significant offensive advantage with elite efficiency (rank 6) that could challenge Nebraska's strong defense (rank 7). While Nebraska's defensive prowess is formidable, Vanderbilt's superior overall metrics (KenPom 12 vs 14, Torvik 10 vs 19) and SEC-tested talent provide a slight edge. The Commodores' ability to score from multiple positions and their experience in close games against top competition should prove decisive in this tightly contested matchup.

reasoningStep.title: Vanderbilt vs Nebraska Round of 32 Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Analyzing the matchup between Vanderbilt's elite offense and Nebraska's elite defense, considering team ratings, matchup dynamics, and tournament context.
reasoningStep.evidence: Vanderbilt ranks 10th in Torvik and 12th in KenPom with the nation's 6th-best offensive efficiency. Nebraska ranks 19th in Torvik and 14th in KenPom with the 7th-best defensive efficiency. Both teams have strong records (Vanderbilt 26-7, Nebraska 26-6) and advanced from the first round. The matchup pits Vanderbilt's offensive firepower against Nebraska's defensive strength, with Vanderbilt holding a slight analytical edge in overall efficiency metrics.
